headline: Will Pinnacle West (PNW) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
summary: Pinnacle West (PNW) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

headline: Joby Aviation Is 'Too Risky,' But This Industrial Stock Is A 'Winner': Jim Cramer
summary: Cramer shared his thoughts on various stocks, calling Joby Aviation too risky, BillionToOne a winner, Boston Scientific caught in competition, Rocket Lab a winner, and Pinnacle West Capital a good company. He also endorsed Intuitive Machines as a speculative stock.
